actors.text: A 95% CI for the mean cup volume is (11.85, 12.15) oz. Which interpretation is correct?
We are 95% confident the mean volume is in (11.85, 12.15)

actors.reflection: The CI estimates the population MEAN, not individual cup volumes. Do not confuse parameter with data range.

actors.text: There is a 95% chance the next cup is in this interval
actors.reflection: Confidence is about the METHOD across repeated samples, not the probability for a future observation. The interval estimates a fixed population mean.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
